evals.prompt: Review this PR as a reviewer.
evals.expected_output: Agent fetches PR diff, performs three-pass review (broad assessment, primary components, complete review), reports findings with severity, gives verdict.
expectations: Agent checks design, functionality, complexity, tests, naming, comments, style
Agent uses severity levels and provides LGTM/Request Changes verdict

evals.prompt: Do a code review on the changes in this branch.
evals.expected_output: Agent reviews branch changes from the reviewer's perspective with structured feedback.
expectations: Agent checks git diff against base branch
Agent evaluates CL size and suggests splitting if needed
Agent writes review comments following Google's commenting guidelines

evals.prompt: Review their changes before we merge.
evals.expected_output: Agent performs a full reviewer-perspective review.
expectations: Agent acknowledges good patterns with GOOD severity
Agent flags red-flag patterns if found
